name: Fruited Spinach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the fruit: Peel and cube the papaya, or core, peel, and cube 2 medium pears.
2. In a screw-top jar, combine vinegar, oil, honey, poppy seed, and dry mustard.
3. Cover and shake well to mix.
4. Add spinach, prepared fruit (papaya or pears), and grapes to the salad.
5. Shake the dressing again and pour over the salad.
6. Toss gently to coat everything evenly.
7. Serve immediately.
